hero.sub: We are Dor & Gal — two carpenters from Beer Sheva building custom wood furniture with love, precision, and honesty.

services.title: CUSTOM WOOD FURNITURE
services.sub: From home furniture to special projects — every piece is made entirely by us, from measuring to installation.

items.title: Home Furniture
items.desc: Wardrobes, shelves, tables and any wood piece — built specifically for your space.

items.title: Special Projects
items.desc: Chess tables with turned legs, wood-iron combos, craftsman work — anything that requires creativity and skill.

items.title: Montessori Furniture
items.desc: Child-height furniture, chairs, towers and shelves in the Montessori approach — from natural woods.

items.title: Wood & Iron
items.desc: Dor is also a welder — we combine wood with iron for unique effects you won't find anywhere else.

portfolio.title: PROJECTS WE'RE PROUD OF
portfolio.sub: Every piece tells a story. Every project is built by hand.

about.title: DOR & GAL — CARPENTERS FROM BEER SHEVA
about.body1: Good friends, Beer Sheva locals, people of people, of work and wood. Dor worked in informal education and did carpentry in a 2-meter room — during the war he decided to open the workshop in the Old City.
about.body2: Gal joined after about 400 days of reserve service in Operation Iron Swords. Our workshop is at HaAtzma'ut 10, Old City of Beer Sheva. We don't compromise on quality — everything is done by us personally, including installation.

items.name: Yael K.
items.text: I ordered a custom wardrobe and Dor & Gal did a perfect job. They came to measure, explained the whole process, and the result is amazing. Highly recommend!

items.name: Michael L.
items.text: I was looking for a special wood-iron table and couldn't find one until I met Moskowood. Precise work, fast turnaround and fair pricing.

items.name: Sara B.
items.text: I ordered Montessori furniture for my daughter's room. They came to measure, offered great ideas, and the result exceeded all expectations!

contact.title: LET'S BUILD SOMETHING TOGETHER
contact.sub: Looking for honest, available carpenters? Have a project in mind? Tell us about it and we'll get back to you soon.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.sent: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
